question.text: What is the minimum tenure for Category I and Category II AIFs?

answer.text: Close-ended with a minimum of 3 years
Close-ended with a minimum of 5 years
Close-ended with a minimum of 1 year

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Category I & II AIFs shall be close ended with a minimum of 3 years tenure. **The Trap:** Category III can be either open-ended or close-ended, but Category I & II must be close-ended. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The tenure can be extended by 2 years with approval of 2/3rd of unitholders by value.
